description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on pull requests, pushes, and published releases. The workflow has three jobs: build, test, and build-with-python. The build job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a centos:7 image, installing dependencies, building and testing ninja in debug and release modes, and uploading the release asset. The test job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with an ubuntu:20.04 image, testing ninja with GCC and Clang. The build-with-python job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with various ubuntu images, testing ninja with Python.
